arts.ttl: 'Exciting': Cole Palmer names the one Chelsea icon he would love to play with
arts.sum: Cole Palmer has revealed that he would love to play with Eden Hazard at Chelsea and even tries to emulate him.

arts.ttl: Chelsea injury news and return dates for Brighton
arts.sum: He returned to training this week though and has been seen taking part once more with his teammates ahead of the trip to West Ham. Chelsea wrote in an update on Wednesday that he and Lavia "continued their rehabilitation on Tuesday with another modified session as they continue their recovery from injury". He will be boosted in his attempts as well, with Malo Gusto returning from injury against Barrow to play 45 minutes.

arts.ttl: Chelsea double transfer confirmed before Brighton as decision made impacting Christopher Nkunku - Tom Coley
arts.sum: Plans are in place for new Chelsea attacker Omari Kellyman to head on loan in January, football.london understands. football.london says: New faces in place at the academy but business as usual, it seems, for Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Solskjaer Man Utd RETURN?, Chelsea's Osimhen MISTAKE, Arsenal transfer BLOW: FootballTransfers Recap
arts.sum: Solskjaer Man Utd RETURN?, Chelsea's Osimhen MISTAKE, Arsenal transfer BLOW: FootballTransfers Recap Solskjaer admits desire to replace Ten Hag as Man Utd manager

arts.ttl: Moises Caicedo named best U23 holding midfielder in the world ahead of rival talents
arts.sum: Chelsea's Moises Caicedo has been named the best holding midfielder under the age of 23 in the world by the CIES Football Observatory for last season. With Caicedo having only one full season of Premier League football under his belt at that time, the enormous sum raised eyebrows, as did Chelsea's subsequent struggles on the pitch.

arts.ttl: Why the pressure is STILL on Nicolas Jackson despite Chelsea form
arts.sum: Jackson was seemingly given a vote of confidence by Chelsea over the summer to lead the line for Enzo Maresca ahead of bringing in rumoured targets like Samu Omorodion and Jhon Duran . A deal for Duran never got over the line, with Villa demanding in excess of €50 million for the 20-year-old, who himself has four Premier League goals this season in just 131 minutes of action.

arts.sum: Paul Merson has weighed in with his opinion on the Chelsea debate regarding Nicolas Jackson and Christopher Nkunku. There’s some serious strength in depth within...

arts.ttl: Joao Pedro injury update: Should you pick him for FPL Gameweek 6?
arts.sum: There haven't been many budget forwards more impressive than Brighton & Hove Albion striker Joao Pedro in Fantasy Premier League this season. Scoring against Manchester United and Arsenal, the forward looked a nailed-on starter who was perhaps fixture-proof in this new-look Seagulls side.
